parameters.Comment: threshold_thr: Threshold for the thresholding method. Not used if method is not 'threshold'. Range: [0, 1]
parameters.Comment: sct_deepseg_create_circular_mas: If sct_deepseg is True and sct_deepseg_create_circular_mask is True, create a circular mask around the SC centerline.
parameters.Comment: sct_deepseg_mask_size: If sct_deepseg is True and sct_deepseg_create_circular_mask is True, create a circular mask around the SC centerline with this radius (in mm).
parameters.Comment: sct_propseg_contrast: Contrast for the sct_propseg method. Not used if method is not 'sct_propseg'.
parameters.Comment: sct_propseg_include_csf: If True, include CSF in the segmentation. Not used if method is not 'sct_propseg'.
parameters.Comment: sendOriginal: If True, send the original image to the server as well.
parameters.Comment: bet_f: Fractional intensity threshold (0->1) smaller values give larger brain outline estimates. Not used if method is not 'bet'.
parameters.Comment: bet_g: Vertical gradient in fractional intensity threshold (-1->1) positive values give larger brain outline at bottom of brain. Not used if method is not 'bet'.
